name: Chimu Agropecuaria S.A.
message: Chimú Agropecuaria, leader in the production and commercialization of poultry, contributes to the well-being of humanity, supplying food for mass consumption in the global market.We are ready to upload more than 14 GB of essential corporate documents such as: financial data (audits, payment details, reports), contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, etc.
